title: You Shook Me All Night Long
why_this_song: You Shook Me All Night Long by AC/DC (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "And you shook me all night long"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "And you shook me all night long"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "And you shook me all night long"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "'Cause the walls start shaking, the Earth was quaking"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Wanted no applause, it's just another course"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Yeah, you shook me all night long
Working double time on the seduction line
She's one of a kind, she's just mine, all mine
Wanted no applause, it's just another course

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shook" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Knocking me out with those American thighs
Wanted no applause, it's just another course

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "You Shook Me All Night Long" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "You Shook Me All Night Long", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "You Shook Me All Night Long" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "You Shook Me All Night Long" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "You Shook Me All Night Long", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "You Shook Me All Night Long", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
